## Outcome

<!-- What user-visible or engineering outcome does this change produce? -->

## Product contract

- [ ] Runtime, documentation, and `PRODUCT_MANIFEST.yaml` agree.
- [ ] Every new file/IPC/RPC/model/database/network payload is parsed at its boundary.
- [ ] Privacy behavior is unchanged or has explicit tests and disclosure UX.
- [ ] Planned or unavailable behavior is not presented as implemented.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] UI changes include current packaged screenshots or an explanation of why they are not applicable.
- [ ] No credentials, user data, databases, uploads, build output, or desktop metadata are included.

## Risks and recovery

<!-- State migration, compatibility, rollback, and any checks not run. -->
